title: Schloß Hubertus
writer: Ludwig Ganghofer, Philipp Lothar Mayring, Peter Ostermayr
actors: Friedrich Ulmer, Hansi Knoteck, Arthur Schröder
plot: From a 19th century allegorical novel :a baron is blinded by an eagle when he withdraws from his difficult children to a mountain retreat; after losing his sight, he has a change of heart and becomes more accommodating to them.
